item.title: Why CoderPush!
item.description: Why join a young company instead of a big one? Because you can learn faster, make mistakes, share learning from mistakes, and have a personal impact on those around you. You shape how the company forms. Why a software studio instead of a product company? It’s like spending a few years at a training camp, for something that you love doing :) There should be more companies like ours in Vietnam, even South East Asia, but we don’t know many.

item.title: [Hired] General Assistant
item.description: Who we are CoderPush is a studio of engineers and designers who collaborate with clients for great software/teams/processes. Nope, it’s not outsourcing 😅 We are a young firm, but with your help, more reviews and testimonials will be verified externally on Clutch. Who you are going to work with: a small team of 15 people, 100% are software engineers, located in Saigon, Hanoi and the US. Most of us are in our 20s, except for the two 🦕 that wrote this, who are in mid 30s.

item.title: [Hired] QA Engineer
[Hired] Senior JS Engineers
item.description: We’re looking for senior JS developers for exciting products, using a mix of React (now with NextJS), TypeScript, RxJS, Vue, and even good old Node. We are a remote-first company! It means you are encouraged to work from anywhere that you enjoy the most. Whenever you feel like you need some human interaction, our crew in Saigon and Hanoi will be happy to see you. Who we are CoderPush is a studio of engineers and designers to collaborate with clients for great software, teams, and processes.

item.title: [Hired] Automation QA Engineer
[Hired] Fintech Startup in SF hiring Full Stack Engineers (mid to senior level)
item.description: We’re looking for strong 💪 JS developers for a FinTech startup in San Francisco. The company is founded by a versatile and experienced entrepreneur 💃. You will be working directly with the team in the US and VN. You are required to be SUPERB in React, TypeScript and Node. We are a remote-first company! It means you are encouraged to work from anywhere that you enjoy the most. We have offices in Saigon and Hanoi for people who’d like to hangout during weekdays too!

item.title: Hiring DevOps Engineers
item.description: We’re looking for a DevOps engineer to help us with the exciting DevOpsSec challenges. As a member of the CoderPush Saigon team, you can sit in our office in Binh Thanh district and help shape a remote-first workplace with full-timers and part-timers from Saigon, Hanoi, and the US. Who we are CoderPush is a studio of engineers and designers to collaborate with clients for great software, teams, and processes. We set a very high expectation on client satisfaction for the long term.

item.title: Hiring JS Full-stack Engineers
item.description: We’re looking for JavaScript developers experienced with React, Vue and Node to join our team. Yes, similar/better libraries (e.g. svelte, angular, mithril) are also great, and we are good at internal cross-training. The projects available right now are with clients with strong tech, based in Singapore. As a member of the CoderPush team, you will help shape a remote-first workplace with full-timers and part-timers from Saigon, Hanoi, and the US.

item.title: Ready to push 📩
item.description: Don’t just build features, but design the right product with the right strategy.
